subject: Rebase PR #15 (agent-6/WCAG CSS) onto updated main and verify build
description:
REQUEST_ID: merge-all-open-prs
DOMAIN: integration
ASSIGNED_TO: worker-6
FILES: src/components/MarketViewer.jsx, src/components/quotes/Chart.jsx, src/components/quotes/TimeSale.jsx, src/components/scanners/HistoricalScanner.jsx, src/components/scanners/LiveScanner.jsx, src/components/trade/EventLog.css, src/components/trade/Montage.css, src/components/trade/Positions.css, src/components/trade/TradeLog.css, src/index.css, src/services/dataFeed.js
VALIDATION: tier2
TIER: 3
PRIORITY: URGENT

## Task: Rebase agent-6 branch (PR #15) onto main

PR #15 contains WCAG AA contrast compliance fixes across multiple domains. Main has since merged PRs #11 (quotes), #14 (scanners), so there are conflicts on scanner and quotes files. Rebase agent-6 onto current main, keeping the WCAG compliance changes where they don't conflict with already-merged work.

## Steps

```bash
# 1. Checkout agent-6 branch
git fetch origin
git checkout agent-6 2>/dev/null || git checkout -b agent-6 origin/agent-6

# 2. Rebase onto main
git rebase origin/main
```

## If Conflicts Arise

**IMPORTANT about --ours/--theirs during rebase:**
During `git rebase`, the naming is REVERSED:
- `--ours` = main (the base you're rebasing onto)
- `--theirs` = your commits being replayed

Conflict resolution rules:
- `src/components/scanners/HistoricalScanner.jsx`, `LiveScanner.jsx`:
  KEEP MAIN's version — main already has the proper hook migration
  `git checkout --ours src/components/scanners/HistoricalScanner.jsx`
  `git checkout --ours src/components/scanners/LiveScanner.jsx`
- `src/components/quotes/Chart.jsx`, `TimeSale.jsx`:
  KEEP MAIN's version — main has hook-migrated versions
  `git checkout --ours src/components/quotes/Chart.jsx`
  `git checkout --ours src/components/quotes/TimeSale.jsx`
- `src/components/MarketViewer.jsx`:
  KEEP MAIN's version — it has the hook migration
  `git checkout --ours src/components/MarketViewer.jsx`
- `src/services/dataFeed.js`:
  KEEP MAIN's version
  `git checkout --ours src/services/dataFeed.js`
- CSS files (EventLog.css, Montage.css, Positions.css, TradeLog.css, index.css):
  KEEP YOUR version — the WCAG contrast fixes are the whole point of this PR
  `git checkout --theirs <file>`
- `dist/` files: REMOVE THEM
  `git rm -rf dist/ 2>/dev/null || true`
- `.claude/` files: KEEP MAIN's version
  `git checkout --ours .claude/`

After resolving each file: `git add <file>` then `git rebase --continue`

## After Rebase

```bash
# Force push rebased branch
git push --force-with-lease origin agent-6

# Build verification
npm install && npm run build
```

Fix any build errors before marking complete.

## Completion

1. Update worker-status.json: status = 'completed_task', current_task = null
2. Append to change-summaries.md: note PR #15 (agent-6) rebased, ready to merge
3. Touch .claude/signals/.completion-signal
